description: A vertical graphic on a black background. Large orange italic text at the top reads ARRESTED. Below is a framed booking-style photograph of a bald man with a mustache and goatee against a pale blue backdrop, captioned in bold black text ILLEGAL ALIEN. White text beneath reads Aggravated criminal sexual abuse and sexual exploitation of minor - material - film. A small White House logo appears at the bottom.
notable_text: ARRESTED; ILLEGAL ALIEN; Aggravated criminal sexual abuse and sexual exploitation of minor - material - film; The WHITE HOUSE
